title: Nerv Flags
wikitext:
[]: Nerv Flags             Quote Post by confidence » Sun Sep 26, 2010 7:56 pm I've been scowering the net trying to find a place that sells NERV logo flags without any luck. I remember seeing one in someone collection pics. Does anyone know where i might be able to find a fairly large sized TV logo flag?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 26, 2010 9:05 pm I have looked unsuccessfully for years for a Nerv flag. Your best bet is to have one custom made for you.
